summary_extracted: Next earnings: May 20, 2026 after market close (some sources cite May 27). Q1 FY2027 ended April 26, 2026. Management guided ~77% revenue growth YoY; analyst consensus at ~79%. Conference call 2pm PT / 5pm ET. Major market catalyst expected.
